top3.sql:
WITH fifo_inventory AS (
    SELECT 
        i.product_id,
        i.location_id,
        i.qty,
        p.purchased,
        o.id AS order_id,
        ol.qty AS order_qty,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY i.product_id, o.id 
            ORDER BY p.purchased ASC, i.qty ASC
        ) AS rn
    FROM inventory i
    JOIN purchases p ON i.purchase_id = p.id
    JOIN orderlines ol ON i.product_id = ol.product_id
    JOIN orders o ON ol.order_id = o.id
    WHERE i.qty > 0
),
assign...
